creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Brad,

Sorry, I didn't have time to last week to answer you, but if tinyfd
isn't required to upgrade Ren'Py, we can probably lay it on its side
for now.

For the future, consider that having extra ports has a cost, in term of
disk space (builders logs, repos, mirrors), cpu time, maintenance time.
So having an extra port nobody uses can be sometimes questionable.

Cheers,
-- rodrigo
